ogTitle: Jam Jerrup vs Jan Juc: Climate Safety

heading: Jam Jerrup vs Jan Juc — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jam Jerrup, Victoria and Jan Juc, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jan Juc has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Jam Jerrup (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jam Jerrup or Jan Juc safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jam Jerrup has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Jan Juc scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jam Jerrup scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Jan Juc scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jam Jerrup or Jan Juc?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jan Juc has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
